creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Daniel Austin from comment #3)
Hello, Dan.

Thanks for the offer! I'd be happy to. most
all the plugins involved are in compiz sub dirs
anyway. So it's not really any additional work. :-)

For the sake of expedience; I'll whip up a mega-diff
changing the MAINTAINER of them to me, for your
approval. I'll reference this pr(1).

Thanks again! :-)

--Chris
